description: A network diagram illustrating the relationships between 5 numbered nodes, labeled 1, 2, 3, 4, and 5. These nodes represent individual Persistent Scatterer (PS) candidates or pixels on a sparse grid. Lines connect various pairs of nodes, each line representing an interferometric phase difference (Δφ) between the connected candidates. Specifically, the following phase differences are depicted: Δφ₁₂, Δφ₁₄, Δφ₁₅, Δφ₂₃, Δφ₂₄, Δφ₃₄, and Δφ₃₅. This graph represents the network of available phase differences used for phase unwrapping in Persistent Scatterer Interferometry (PSI) techniques.
